description:
Extension crash to fix:

```
Extension "/Users/bkonowitz/.pi/agent/git/github.com/bkono/sbd-pi-extensions/packages/pi-om-extension/src/index.ts" error: The text contains a special token that is not allowed: <|endoftext|>
```

Likely scope:
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/tokens.ts`
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/index.ts`
- tests under `packages/pi-om-extension/src/__tests__`

Goal:
- make token counting robust when message/content includes tiktoken sentinel text like `<|endoftext|>`
- avoid crashing OM extension hooks during context emission
- add regression coverage proving the special-token text is handled safely

Likely implementation direction:
- sanitize/escape or otherwise safely count special-token literals before calling js-tiktoken encode
- keep behavior conservative and deterministic
- cover both direct token counting and the extension path that currently throws

Done when:
- failing case no longer throws
- regression test added
- lint, test, and typecheck pass clean
title: Handle special tiktoken sentinel tokens in pi-om token counting
